# Transcrição: 10. Commission Close

- **Fonte:** 10. Commission Close
- **Duração:** 00:34
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 00:34]

The powerful commission close. Mr. Johnson, any more of a discount at this point would result in me not getting paid on this transaction. And I don't believe that's what you want from me. What remains as the profit in this transaction is merely my commission. And that is the sole and only way I get compensated and how I take care of my family. Come on, sir. Come on, boss. Help me out here. Look, I'm working day and night to take care of my family with only a small hope that if I work hard enough, I might get close to where you are someday. Sir, I need your approval right here.
